title: Vaccine records: Access your or your child’s vaccination history - Canada.ca
content:
## Vaccine records: Access your or your child’s vaccination history
To access your or your child's vaccine record, please contact your primary health care provider or your local, provincial or territorial public health unit. Select your province or territory to be taken to their information.
- Alberta: MyHealth records

### COVID-19 vaccination
- Alberta: COVID-19 records
- British Columbia: Health Gateway
- Manitoba Health: Immunization record

### COVID-19 vaccination
Create a Manitoba Shared Health COVID-19 Online Result Display account to access your vaccine information.
You need a Manitoba immunization card to create an account.
- New Brunswick: Contact your local public health unit
- New Brunswick: Log into MyHealthNB if you're 16 years of age or older

## Newfoundland and Labrador
- Newfoundland and Labrador: Contact your regional health unit

### COVID-19 vaccination
- Newfoundland and Labrador: COVID-19 vaccination record

## Northwest Territories
- Northwest Territories: Contact your local public health unit

### COVID-19 vaccination
- Northwest Territories: COVID-19 electronic proof of vaccination
- Nova Scotia: VaxRecordsNS

### COVID-19 vaccination
- Nova Scotia: COVID-19 vaccination receipts
- Nunavut: Contact your public health unit
- Ontario: Contact your local health unit

## Prince Edward Island
- Prince Edward Island: Contact your local public health nursing office

### COVID-19 vaccination
- Prince Edward Island: COVID-19 immunization record
- Quebec: Request your vaccination record
- Saskatchewan: MySaskHealthRecord
- Yukon: Contact your community health centre
